commonsense evidence:
Common alert types include: Structuring (Smurfing), Unusual Transaction Pattern, High-Risk Country Transaction, Large Cash Transaction, Rapid Movement of Funds, PEP Transaction

Severity levels: Low, Medium, High, Critical
